prompt: Create a soft, sunny, dreamy square profile portrait of Ava, a young woman facing the camera with a warm natural smile. She has fair sun-kissed skin with many visible freckles across her nose, cheeks, and forehead, hazel-green eyes with detailed catchlights and subtle golden corona coloring, long natural eyelashes, softly defined brows with individual brow hairs, and realistic skin texture. Her hair is light golden brown, parted in the center, worn loose and straight with slightly wavy ends, with many fine wispy flyaway hairs catching the light. She wears small gold hoop earrings and a white sleeveless lace-trimmed top with delicate ruffled lace straps and a square neckline. Frame as a close-up head-and-shoulders profile picture, centered and symmetrical, from upper chest to just above the head, looking directly into the lens. Use warm golden-hour sunlight from the front-left, gentle highlights on the cheeks and hair, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, and a dreamy pastel pale lavender studio backdrop with very subtle paper texture. Style should be highly realistic polished portrait photography, natural beauty editorial, soft but crisp facial detail, no heavy makeup, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a soft, sunny, dreamy square profile portrait of Ava, a young woman facing the camera with a warm natural smile. She has fair sun-kissed skin with many visible freckles across her nose, cheeks, and forehead, hazel-green eyes with detailed catchlights and subtle golden corona coloring, long natural eyelashes, softly defined brows with individual brow hairs, and realistic skin texture. Her hair is light golden brown, parted in the center, worn loose and straight with slightly wavy ends, with many fine wispy flyaway hairs catching the light. She wears small gold hoop earrings and a white sleeveless lace-trimmed top with delicate ruffled lace straps and a square neckline. Frame as a close-up head-and-shoulders profile picture, centered and symmetrical, from upper chest to just above the head, looking directly into the lens. Use warm golden-hour sunlight from the front-left, gentle highlights on the cheeks and hair, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, and a dreamy pastel pale lavender studio backdrop with very subtle paper texture. Style should be highly realistic polished portrait photography, natural beauty editorial, soft but crisp facial detail, no heavy makeup, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张柔和、阳光、梦幻的方形个人肖像，主角是 Ava，一位正对镜头、露出温暖自然微笑的年轻女性。她拥有白皙且被阳光亲吻过的肌肤，鼻梁、脸颊和额头上布满清晰可见的雀斑；榛绿色双眸中带有细腻的眼神光和淡淡的金色光晕，睫毛修长自然，眉毛轮廓柔和且根根分明，皮肤质感真实。她的发色为 浅金棕色，中分发型，自然垂落且发尾微卷，许多细碎的发丝在光线下显得轻盈灵动。她佩戴着小巧的金质圆环耳饰，身穿白色无袖蕾丝边上衣，带有精致的荷叶边蕾丝肩带和方领设计。构图采用近景头像，居中且对称，范围从上胸部到头顶上方，直视镜头。光线采用来自左前方的温暖黄金时刻阳光，脸颊和头发上有柔和的高光，阴影自然，浅景深效果，背景为梦幻般的 淡紫色 摄影棚背景，带有极细微的纸张纹理。风格应为高度写实的精致肖像摄影，自然美妆大片，面部细节柔和而清晰，无浓妆，无文字，无水印，画面中无其他人。
